author: Vitalii 'Mevkh' Vlasiuk
description: Help Claude Code see the active note, tabs, and selection, open files, and propose edits through a side-by-side diff view. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Vitaly Vlasyuk (mevkh)
manifest.description: Host the Claude Code IDE integration protocol. Claude sees the active note, tabs, and selection, opens files, and proposes edits through a side-by-side diff view with one-click Accept or Reject.
manifest.name: Claude Code IDE Pro

name: Claude Code IDE Pro

releases.author: sithamet
releases.description:
## ✨ New

- **`@`-mention vault files in the Claude pane** — type `@` and tab-complete any note or folder; Claude reads it inline.
- **"Send to Claude" command** — Cmd+P → `Send to Claude (selection or whole note)`. With text selected it sends the range; otherwise the whole active note. Bind a hotkey in Settings → Hotkeys for one-key access.
- **Right-click → "Send selection to Claude"** — context menu item on any non-empty selection in the editor.
- **Active selection tracking** — Claude is now told via `selection_changed` whenever you highlight text or switch files. Empty-selection cursor wiggles in the same file are filtered to keep the signal clean.

## 🐛 Fixed

- Selection-tracking filter no longer swallows the *deselect* transition or the *file-switch-without-selection* case. Claude now reliably knows which file you're on and when a selection has gone away.

## 📖 Docs

- README documents the three new ways to push context (`@`, command, right-click) with a screenshot of the `@`-completion in action.
- Install instructions updated — plugin is now in the official Community Plugins directory.
- Roadmap updated: replaced "re-enable selection_changed" (shipped) with "zero-touch auto-connect" (next target).
releases.name: 0.1.2 — Send to Claude + active selection tracking

releases.author: sithamet
releases.description:
Patch release addressing Obsidian community-plugin review feedback. No functional changes from 0.1.0.

**Fixes**
- Removed \"Obsidian\" from the \`manifest.json\` \`description\` (Obsidian's review policy flags it as redundant inside the plugin directory).
- Added a proper \`# Claude Code IDE Pro\` H1 to the README so the review's title-extractor matches \`manifest.json\` \`name\` correctly (was matching a shell comment from inside a code block before).
- Bumped version across \`manifest.json\`, \`package.json\`, and \`package-lock.json\` so they stay in sync.

**Same as 0.1.0**
- 12 standard Claude Code IDE protocol tools, all real implementations (\`openFile\`, \`openDiff\` via CodeMirror MergeView, \`getCurrentSelection\`, etc.)
- 8 Obsidian-native MCP tools (\`getBacklinks\`, \`resolveWikilink\`, \`searchVault\`, …)
- One-click Accept inside Obsidian — no terminal double-prompt
- Auth-gated, loopback-only WebSocket. No external network calls, no telemetry.

**Manual install:** download \`main.js\`, \`manifest.json\`, \`styles.css\` below → place under \`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/claude-code-ide-pro/\` → Settings → Community Plugins → enable.

**BRAT:** add \`Transept-AI/obsidian-claude-code-ide-pro\`.
releases.name: 0.1.1 — Review-feedback fixes

releases.author: vitalii-mevkh
releases.description:
First public release of **Claude Code IDE Pro** — full Claude Code IDE protocol host for Obsidian.

## What's in this release

**Claude is now Obsidian-aware.** Launch \`claude\` from inside your vault, type \`/ide\`, and Claude connects to Obsidian. From there:

- Claude follows you between notes (sees what's active)
- Claude reads your selection (no copy-paste)
- Claude opens files for you (right note, right line)
- Edits land as **side-by-side diffs in Obsidian** — one-click Accept, no terminal double-prompt

## What's new vs. existing alternatives

This is a **full IDE host** (not a read-only context bridge). Same WebSocket + MCP contract VS Code and JetBrains use, implemented in full:

- **12 standard IDE tools** — every one wired up (not stubbed), so \`openDiff\` actually shows a diff, \`openFile\` actually navigates, \`saveDocument\` actually persists
- **8 Obsidian-native MCP tools** — \`getBacklinks\`, \`resolveWikilink\`, \`getFrontmatter\`, \`searchVault\`, \`getOutgoingLinks\`, \`getActiveNoteContent\`, \`getDailyNote\`, \`listFilesInFolder\`. Vault-graph queries any MCP client can call.
- **Auth-gated, loopback-only WebSocket** — no external network calls, ever
- **No telemetry** — full stop

## Manual install

1. Download \`main.js\`, \`manifest.json\`, and \`styles.css\` from this release
2. Place them under \`<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/claude-code-ide-pro/\`
3. Settings → Community Plugins → enable **Claude Code IDE Pro**

Pairs well with [\`polyipseity/obsidian-terminal\`](https://github.com/polyipseity/obsidian-terminal) for the terminal pane.

## Or install via [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat)

Add \`vitalii-mevkh/obsidian-claude-code-ide-pro\` as a beta plugin in BRAT.

Full details: [README](https://github.com/vitalii-mevkh/obsidian-claude-code-ide-pro/blob/main/README.md).
releases.name: 0.1.0 — Initial release
